content: 2025 episodic memory transformer agents can be structured to bootstrap their own curiosity-driven active learning by treating every partial, unindexed existing agent exploration trajectory as a 'missing episodic memory' that the agent is intrinsically motivated to resolve, turning fragmented prior agent data into a self-sustaining source of novel exploration targets. This framework reframes unused underprocessed agent trajectory data from earlier development cycles as a built-in reward signal rather than dead training weight.
